title: Active Memory Separation and Cursor Context Economy Pass 2

intake.clarifying_skip_rationale: Source directive enumerates 12 implementation sections, 20 acceptance criteria, 7 manual-validation actions, explicit non-goals, and explicit plan-stage latitude points. The intake-analyst surfaces remaining latitude as `## Plan-stage decisions required` rather than as open intake questions per the cursor-token-economy precedent.
intake.human_approval_request_note: Operator ratification is required because the spec edits AGENTS.md, the .cursor/rules/*.mdc mirror layer, and routing pointers for documentation-impact and policy-compliance contracts.

implement.dispatch_summary: Seven waves completed: memory-tier handbook and active-memory files; ADR-0006; AGENTS.md slimming; Cursor rule audit and six narrowed .mdc projections; .cursorindexingignore plus context-budget tool and tests; slice-7 governance (backlog verify, feature index, documentation-impact, policy-compliance, delivery-report scaffold, README pointer).

waves.description: Handbook memory-tier taxonomy, glossary nouns, index and context-economy routes, soft budgets, simple task mode, escalation guidance.
ADR-0006 active versus archival memory decision record.
AGENTS.md slimming and route pointers to handbook and memory tiers.
Cursor rule audit artifact and six narrowed rule projections (supervisor kept as audited).
Indexing policy and context-budget report with tests.
Governance slice: backlog refinement, feature index routing, task documentation-impact and policy-compliance refresh, optional delivery-report scaffold, README key-path pointer.

verification_gates.node_context_budget_report: pass (exit 0; headline numbers in delivery summary)
verification_gates.no_historical_deletions: pass (git status short list contains no D entries for src/work/**, src/memory/**, src/inbox/out/**, src/inbox/threads/**)

operator_manual_validation_requests: Confirm custom agents under `.cursor/agents/**` are still discoverable if that path remains excluded from indexing.
Run 3–5 comparable simple Cursor tasks and record cache-read totals.
Compare against the previous post-pass-1 result of approximately 770K cache-read tokens.
Confirm explicit references to `@docs/PRD.md`, `@docs/BOOTSTRAP.md`, selected `src/work/**` artifacts, and selected durable memory files still work when intentionally requested.
Confirm `src/memory/active/current.md` gives a clear operator-facing picture of active context without requiring traversal of archival memory.

decisions.D1: src/memory/handbook/context-economy.md is canonical for simple task mode.
decisions.D2: ADR 0006 is the next available sequence.
decisions.D3: Active-memory budget-warning tooling is deferred to backlog.
decisions.D4: src/memory/handbook/context-economy.md is canonical for model and context escalation guidance.
decisions.D5: AGENTS.md slimming proceeds, but the 900-word target is not a hard gate.

notifier.inbox_source_rename_rule: src/memory/handbook/inbox-lifecycle.md §3c (timestamp prefix ownership: agent performing migration appends two time prefixes derived from archive-time UTC under operator override per ADR-0005 §47)
notifier.stale_citation_followup: src/memory/features/active-memory-context-economy-pass-2/spec.md retains point-in-time citations to the original src/inbox/in/ path; contentHash still verifies; librarian knowledge-curation sweep SHOULD flag and propose updates per src/personas/librarian.md §"What you MUST produce" item 3

shipped.ship_authority: operator_override (runtime ship stage and notifier post_run not wired in this repo per AGENTS.md §8)
shipped.active_memory_rotation_authority: operator_override (no persona currently owns src/memory/active/** post-ship rotation; gap noted in delivery report follow-ups)

librarian_populated_authority: operator_override (runtime feature-delivery post_run hook not wired; operator manually executed librarian's index_artifacts and update_backlog actions per src/personas/librarian.md §"What you MUST produce" items 1–2)

metadata.scaffold_note: Intake-analyst writes the spec and per-feature index scaffold. Librarian populates the full index at the post_run stage per persona obligation.
